1032 O0390C_PT_CD O0390C_PT_CD O0390C Physical Therapy Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received Physical Therapy for at least 15 minutes a day on one or more days in the last 7 days -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2025
1033 O0390D_RT_CD O0390D_RT_CD O0390D Respiratory Therapy Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received Respiratory Therapy for at least 15 minutes a day on one or
